name: hyperwave-engine
description: HyperWave engine: P2P stadium wave over Hyperswarm/Autobase with WDK payments, host-agnostic, runs under Bare.
author: Mokhtar Naamani <mokhtar.naamani@gmail.com>

scripts.lint:jsdoc: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --strict --skipLibCheck --maxNodeModuleJsDepth 0 --target es2022 lib/ring.js lib/attest.js lib/sweep.js lib/gallery.js lib/gallery-session.js lib/flood.js lib/peer-table.js lib/selfie.js lib/wave.js lib/wallet.js lib/engine.js lib/pins.js 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS80' ; test $? -eq 1
